findings.correction: preparedSpells should contain at least 2 ranger spells selected by the player (from spells-by-class ranger list with minLevel 1), plus Hunter's Mark which is always prepared
findings.issue: Ranger has 0 prepared spells at level 1, but D&D 2024 Ranger gets 2 prepared spell slots minimum at level 1, plus Hunter's Mark which is always prepared. Sheet should have at least 3 prepared spells.
